module.name: client
module.purpose: Client-facing draft split into an interactive streaming CLI binary/interface, a remoc-backed core client session/task endpoint, a client-side executor draft for streamed tool invocations, and a unified tool interface layer where Tool carries type/platform/category/name/description/schema/invoke contracts while ToolRegistry publishes DefaultPreview and ToolPreview records from category metadata and native tools.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: Interactive CLI binary entry and public interface for connecting to the core client endpoint, sending each typed prompt as a chat request, streaming response segments to stdout, and reporting how many segments were printed, with mod.rs limited to module wiring.

childModules.name: core
childModules.purpose: Core client session endpoint backed by remoc/TCP with task creation, initial request submission, and streamed response segment receives.

childModules.name: executor
childModules.purpose: Client-side executor draft that dispatches tool invocations through a registry and streams tool outcomes over a channel.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Client-side unified tool interface layer with direct Tool metadata methods, ToolType Primary/Native/Skill/User variants, ToolPreview/DefaultPreview registry advertising, CategoryPreview category metadata from category.rs, typed errors, and folder-organized category/native preview lists.
